answers: Start a podcast: choose a niche, get a USB mic ($50-100), use free software (Audacity), record, edit, and publish on Anchor.
Equipment: USB microphone (Blue Yeti or similar), headphones, pop filter, and quiet room. That's enough to start.
Podcasting tips: be consistent (weekly/biweekly), plan episodes, edit out dead air, and promote on social media.
Podcast banano: topic choose koro, mic keno, Audacity diye record koro, Anchor.fm e upload koro — free hosting!
